description: Abortion: Respondents who said 'always legal' vs those who said 'no exceptions', 'only exceptions' or 'undecided'
source_question: Which comes closest to your position on abortion: that abortion should be legal in all cases; that abortion should be legal with some restrictions; that abortion should be illegal except in cases of rape, incest or to save the mother’s life; or that abortion should be made illegal without any exceptions?
responses: Always legal, Some restriction, Only exceptions, No exceptions,Undecided
dependent_variable: Respondents who said 'always legal' vs those who said 'no exceptions', 'only exceptions' or 'undecided'
score_high_means: higher score = more likely to hold the stated/positive position
aggregation_guidance: Use mean score per district (0–100 scale). Scores above ~60 indicate meaningful lean; below ~40 indicate lean in opposite direction. Flag threshold (if present) marks the actionable tail population.

Do you think we should increase pressure on the Russians through acts like enforcing a no fly zone or Do you think we should continue our current approach of arming Ukranians and applying economic sanctions or Do you think the US should not be involved on either side of this conflict or Do you think Russia is justified in invading the Ukraine?
responses: Increase Pressure, Continue Arming Ukrainians, Not our Fight, Russia Justified, Unsure
dependent_variable: Respondents who said ‘continue’ vs. those who said ‘escalate’,'not our fight', 'russia justified',’unsure’
score_high_means: higher score = more aligned with dependent variable position
aggregation_guidance: Use mean score per district (0–100 scale). Scores above ~60 indicate meaningful lean; below ~40 indicate lean in opposite direction. Flag threshold (if present) marks the actionable tail population.
